Team Uniforms

Custom Baseball Uniforms: The Complete Team Guide

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 9, 2026 ☕ 10 min read
Home › Blog › Custom Baseball Uniforms Guide

Baseball uniforms carry more tradition than any other team sport - pinstripes, script lettering, button fronts - while modern teams increasingly want topo prints, neon fades and two-button hybrids. The good news: with sublimated manufacturing you no longer choose between classic and custom, and you certainly do not pay big-brand catalog prices. This guide covers construction, styles, real costs and the ordering process; our baseball kit catalog shows 24 finished designs you can customize as-is.

Jersey Styles: What Teams Actually Order

  • Full button-down: the traditional pro look. Sublimation handles pinstripes perfectly - they align at seams because they are printed on the panel, not woven.
  • Two-button pullover: the youth and travel-ball standard - cheaper, cleaner for printed graphics, no button-gap issues for younger players.
  • Full-sub fashion jerseys: topo maps, gradients, camo, city-connect style concepts - the fastest-growing segment (see the Black Topo and White Neon designs in our catalog).
  • Softball builds: same construction with women's grading and sleeveless/short-sleeve options - order in the same 20-set run.

Construction Specs That Matter on the Diamond

  • Jersey: 150–200 GSM moisture-wicking poly with mesh side panels for summer tournaments; double-needle hems throughout.
  • Pants: the abuse-taker - demand 240–300 GSM stretch poly twill, double-layer knees, reinforced belt loops and crotch gusset. Cheap pants are where uniform orders go wrong.
  • Sliding durability: flat-lock seams and bartacked stress points; ask for the pant fabric's abrasion spec, not just the jersey's.
  • Numbers/names: sublimated - any font including classic athletic serif, with outlines and shadows at no extra cost.

Real 2026 Costs

PackagePer set (20-set order)
Two-button jersey + pants$45–70
Full button-down + pants (incl. pinstripe designs)$52–80
Premium full-sub fashion set$55–85
Jersey only (tournament alternates)$22–38

Compare that with US team-dealer catalogs at $120–200 per stitched set and the appeal of factory-direct is obvious - our direct-vs-middleman comparison explains where that gap comes from. Every design on the kits page lists its range; MOQ is 20 sets with mixed sizes.

The Smart Ordering Timeline

  1. 10 weeks before opening day: lock colors and design (pick from catalog or send your logo for a custom concept - mockups are free and take 24-48 hours).
  2. 8 weeks out: sample set in 5–7 days; check pant fit with sliding gear and jersey length at full swing.
  3. 6 weeks out: final roster with names/numbers; production runs 2–4 weeks.
  4. 2 weeks out: DDP delivery in 3–7 days, duties handled - relevant for US teams (how we serve US clubs).

Travel teams playing 40+ game seasons should order a home/away pair per player upfront - the second set costs far less than mid-season wear-out replacements, and both sets match perfectly because sublimation reprints are color-exact.

Youth Leagues, Travel Ball, and Sponsors

Youth and Little League programs: prioritize two-button pullovers, elastic-waist pants, and a size run one step generous. Travel/select programs: this is where fashion-sub designs win recruiting battles - a distinctive uniform is free marketing at every tournament. Sponsor logos (the financial backbone of most clubs) are sublimated in at no charge, positioned per your league's placement rules.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much do custom baseball uniforms cost?

Factory-direct sublimated sets run $45-85 per jersey + pants set at 20-set quantities, including names, numbers, pinstripes and sponsor logos. US team-dealer catalogs charge $120-200 for equivalent stitched sets.

What is the minimum order for baseball uniforms?

20 sets per design at FABRIOZA, with youth and adult sizes (and softball grading) mixed freely within one order.

Can you do real pinstripe uniforms?

Yes - pinstripes are sublimated into the fabric, which keeps them perfectly aligned at seams and lets you pair them with any custom lettering or logo colors. See the Navy Pinstripe design in our baseball kit catalog.

How long does a baseball uniform order take?

Mockup in 24-48 hours, sample in 5-7 days, production 2-4 weeks, delivery 3-7 days - about 6 weeks total. Start 10 weeks before opening day for a comfortable buffer.

Do you make matching softball uniforms?

Yes - the same designs are produced with women's size grading, sleeveless or short-sleeve jersey options, and matching pants or shorts, orderable within the same 20-set minimum.

Get Your Team's Baseball Uniform Quote

Send your team colors and logo - free mockup in 24-48 hours, jersey + pants sets from 20 sets per design, youth and adult sizes mixed freely.
